title: SPP Fuel Mix JSON API
description:
Fuel Mix in 5-minute intervals as reported by SPP.

As of April 1st, 2026, this data includes output from generators in SPP West (SWPW) as RTO's expansion into the Western Interconnection went live.

For fuel mix by individual SPP BAA, see [SPP Fuel Mix by BAA](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_fuel_mix_by_baa).
